description: Create a new quantity-based Discount Schema in iDempiere named 'Bulk Order Incentive 2024' with the description 'Volume-based tiered discounts for bulk purchasing' and Discount Type set to 'Breaks'. Configure the following four discount break lines: Sequence 10 with a Break Value of 10 and 5% discount; Sequence 20 with a Break Value of 25 and 8% discount; Sequence 30 with a Break Value of 50 and 12% discount; and Sequence 40 with a Break Value of 100 and 15% discount. Ensure the schema and all lines are active and saved.
